title: Best Game Graphics
description: Awarded Best Game Graphics for the unique claymation stop-motion visual style — handcrafted frame-by-frame animations that bring the beat 'em up world to life with a tactile, physical feel unlike anything else at the jam.

title: Best Game Mechanic
description: Awarded Best Game Mechanic for the chaotic Tetris-block wizard duel system — where falling blocks become tactical hazards, fireballs stun but knockback kills, and every match plays out differently.
